sources: PRSA (Public Relations Society of America) Career Center
PRWeek and AdWeek Industry Hiring Reports
PRSSA Student Resources and Employer Surveys
LinkedIn Marketing and Communications Hiring Trends

smart.label: Writing and Media Acumen
what_counts: Communications, PR, Journalism, Advertising, or Marketing major
Relevant coursework: media studies, writing, campaigns, analytics
Honors or academic distinction in writing/media
Certifications: Google Analytics, Meta Blueprint, HubSpot

grit.label: Portfolio Impact and Ownership
what_counts: Campaign ownership with measurable results (reach, engagement, conversions)
Internships at agencies, brands, or media outlets
Leadership in PRSSA, student media, or communications orgs
Quantified outcomes: follower growth, impressions, click-through, press mentions
Client or stakeholder work with deliverables

build.label: Content and Campaign Proof
what_counts: Portfolio of clips, campaigns, or content samples
Named channels and content types (social, press release, blog, video)
Published work (student paper, blog, client deliverables)
Tools: Muck Rack, Canva, Hootsuite, Adobe Creative Suite
Campaign case studies with before/after or results

common_gaps.gap: No campaign portfolio or metrics to show
common_gaps.fix: Run a real campaign - even for a student org or personal brand. Measure results. Add numbers: reach, impressions, engagement rate, conversions, or press mentions.

common_gaps.gap: No PR or communications internship before senior year
common_gaps.fix: Agency internships are the primary signal. Apply to PR firms, in-house comms teams, or student-run agencies. PRSSA and networking are key entry points.

common_gaps.gap: Resume lacks writing samples or portfolio link
common_gaps.fix: Include a portfolio URL. Add 2-3 specific examples: a press release, social campaign, or article. Name the outlet or client.
Google Analytics, Meta Blueprint, and HubSpot certifications are free and widely recognized. Add them under Skills or Certifications.
Add metrics: grew followers by X%, achieved Y impressions, wrote Z pieces. Name the platform, audience size, and outcome.
